summary.sosovalue: Low to moderate positive sentiment. Community engagement primarily promotional, focusing on airdrops (Season 2 EXP), staking rewards, and market analysis sharing. Users highlight SSI staking strength (TVL $95.9M, APY 20.76%, 488K holders) and ecosystem value (data platform, SSI indexes, SoDEX DEX). No negative mentions; excitement around rewards and utility.

summary.ssi: Positive sentiment around SSI Index/Staking. Highlighted for strong metrics (Epoch 4: high TVL, APY, holder count) and as strategic investment tool like ETFs. Users positioning for rewards and long-term growth.
